examples.title: Creating an Empty Dictionary
examples.description: An example of how to create an empty dictionary in Python.
examples.explanation: This code creates an empty dictionary called my_dict.

examples.title: Adding Key-Value Pairs to a Dictionary
examples.description: An example of how to add key-value pairs to a dictionary in Python.
examples.explanation: This code adds two key-value pairs to the my_dict dictionary.

examples.title: Retrieving a Value from a Dictionary
examples.description: An example of how to retrieve a value from a dictionary in Python.
examples.explanation: This code retrieves the value associated with the 'name' key from the my_dict dictionary.
